After the success of Narayani Bahas, Chitwan Bahas, and Zero Hour Sequels, Scholastic Forum is set to organize Physics Olympiad 2019 for the very first time in Chitwan.

The main objective of the program is to prioritize theoretical physics and to expose students in a knowledge sharing horizon.

Furthermore, the event will feature a short science exhibition, robotics and techno-demonstrations, a brief scientific presentation hour and discussions.

The event is going to be held on Friday in the premises of U-tech College.
